title.en: PHY VII Reference Tour: From Acronyms to the OCC Frame on the Wire
title.zh: PHY VII 参考导览：从缩略语到光学相机通信的空口帧

blocks.en: This lesson is a guided walk through the heart of the 802.15.7a-2024 amendment — the part that adds a brand-new optical PHY (physical layer) called PHY VII for higher-rate, longer-range Optical Camera Communication (OCC). OCC means a transmitter (an LED light source) blinks data and an ordinary camera sensor recovers it frame-by-frame. Because the amendment edits an existing standard, almost every clause here either inserts a new PHY VII case or appends 'and PHY VII' to a list. We will define each acronym on first use and give every clause a clear home so you can read the standard fluently.
blocks.zh: 本课带你走进 802.15.7a-2024 修正案的核心——它新增了一个全新的光学物理层（PHY，physical layer），称为 PHY VII，用于更高速率、更远距离的光学相机通信（OCC，Optical Camera Communication）。OCC 指的是发射端（一个 LED 光源）通过闪烁来传输数据，而普通的相机传感器逐帧将其恢复出来。由于本修正案是在既有标准基础上做编辑，这里几乎每一条款要么新增一个 PHY VII 的分支，要么在某个列表末尾追加“and PHY VII”。我们会在每个缩略语首次出现时给出定义，并为每一条款找到清晰的归属，让你能够流畅地阅读这份标准。

blocks.en: Clause 3.2 (Acronyms and abbreviations) seeds the vocabulary the rest of the amendment uses. PHY VII is not one modulation but a family of seven, each named by an acronym: RS-OFDM (rolling shutter orthogonal frequency division multiplexing), MIMO-COOK (multiple input multiple output camera on-off keying), O-NOMA (optical non-orthogonal multiple access), MIMO-OOK (multiple input multiple output on-off keying), HOOK-OFDM (hybrid on-off keying OFDM), HS2PSK-OFDM (hybrid spatial 2-phase-shift keying OFDM), and BPPM (bi-level pulse position modulation). The clause also adds SN (sequence number). Keep these seven names handy — they reappear in every PHY VII clause below.
blocks.zh: 第 3.2 条（缩略语与缩写）为修正案其余部分播下了术语的种子。PHY VII 并不是单一调制方式，而是七种构成的家族，每种都用一个缩略语命名：RS-OFDM（滚动快门正交频分复用，rolling shutter orthogonal frequency division multiplexing）、MIMO-COOK（多输入多输出相机通断键控，multiple input multiple output camera on-off keying）、O-NOMA（光学非正交多址，optical non-orthogonal multiple access）、MIMO-OOK（多输入多输出通断键控，multiple input multiple output on-off keying）、HOOK-OFDM（混合通断键控正交频分复用，hybrid on-off keying OFDM）、HS2PSK-OFDM（混合空间二相移键控正交频分复用，hybrid spatial 2-phase-shift keying OFDM）以及 BPPM（双电平脉冲位置调制，bi-level pulse position modulation）。该条款还新增了 SN（序列号，sequence number）。记住这七个名字——下文每一条 PHY VII 条款都会再次出现它们。

blocks.en: Clause 4.4 (Architecture) gives PHY VII its identity. Sub-clause 4.4.1 (PHY types) inserts item (g): PHY VII targets discrete light sources at data rates up to 9.6 Mbps for Internet of Things (IoT) applications, using a high-speed camera under low mobility (under 10 km/h). A key architectural rule: like PHY IV/V/VI, PHY VII forbids over-the-air PHY frame configuration. Instead the PHY PAN Information Base (PHY PIB) — a table of attributes the Device Management Entity, DME, writes and the PHY reads — carries all configuration. OCC data rates simply cannot afford the overhead of advertising the configuration on the link, so there is no 'base default' mode.
blocks.zh: 第 4.4 条（架构）赋予了 PHY VII 自己的身份。子条款 4.4.1（PHY 类型）插入了第 (g) 项：PHY VII 面向离散光源，数据速率最高可达 9.6 Mbps，用于物联网（IoT，Internet of Things）应用，使用高速相机并工作于低移动性场景（低于 10 km/h）。一条关键的架构规则是：与 PHY IV/V/VI 一样，PHY VII 禁止通过空口进行 PHY 帧配置。取而代之的是由 PHY 个域网信息库（PHY PIB，PHY PAN Information Base）——一张由设备管理实体（DME，Device Management Entity）写入、由 PHY 读取的属性表——承载全部配置。OCC 的数据速率根本无法承受在链路上通告配置所带来的开销，因此不存在“基础默认”模式。

blocks.en: Clause 5 (MAC protocol specifications) folds PHY VII into the medium access control (MAC) layer. Sub-clause 5.1.2 (Starting an OWPAN — an optical wireless personal area network) extends device discovery so PHY VII joins the family of non-interoperable camera PHYs. Sub-clause 5.2.1 (General MAC frame formats) is where it gets concrete: for PHY VII, the MAC frame fields are mostly suppressed and used only when the MIMO-OOK mode is active. The new MIMO-OOK Frame Control field (one octet) carries a 3-bit Frame Type (Beacon/Data/Command), plus Security Enabled, Frame Pending, and Destination/Source OWPAN Address flags. The Sequence Number, Destination/Source Address, Frame Payload, and FCS (frame check sequence) fields likewise exist only in MIMO-OOK mode. Sub-clause 5.3 (MAC command frames) updates the Capabilities information element so a device can advertise 'PHY VII support' as a single bit.
blocks.zh: 第 5 条（MAC 协议规范）将 PHY VII 纳入媒体访问控制（MAC，medium access control）层。子条款 5.1.2（启动 OWPAN——光学无线个域网，optical wireless personal area network）扩展了设备发现流程，使 PHY VII 加入这一组互不互通的相机 PHY。子条款 5.2.1（通用 MAC 帧格式）则更为具体：对 PHY VII 而言，MAC 帧字段大多被抑制，仅当 MIMO-OOK 模式启用时才使用。新增的 MIMO-OOK 帧控制字段（一个八位字节）携带一个 3 比特的帧类型（信标/数据/命令），外加安全使能、帧挂起以及目的/源 OWPAN 地址标志。序列号、目的/源地址、帧负载以及 FCS（帧校验序列，frame check sequence）字段同样只在 MIMO-OOK 模式下存在。子条款 5.3（MAC 命令帧）更新了能力信息元素，使设备能够用单个比特通告“PHY VII 支持”。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 120" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="8" y="18" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="13">MIMO-OOK Frame Control field (1 octet)</text><rect x="8" y="34" width="150" height="40"/><rect x="158" y="34" width="60" height="40"/><rect x="218" y="34" width="100" height="40"/><rect x="318" y="34" width="100" height="40"/><rect x="418" y="34" width="100" height="40"/><rect x="518" y="34" width="114" height="40"/><text x="14" y="58" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Frame type (b0-b2)</text><text x="168" y="58" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">Resvd</text><text x="224" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Security</text><text x="224" y="66" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Enabled</text><text x="324" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Frame</text><text x="324" y="66" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Pending</text><text x="424" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Dest OWPAN</text><text x="424" y="66" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Address</text><text x="524" y="52" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Src OWPAN</text><text x="524" y="66" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Address</text><text x="14" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">bits 0-2</text><text x="180" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">3</text><text x="262" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">4</text><text x="362" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">5</text><text x="462" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">6</text><text x="568" y="92" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">7</text></svg>

caption.en: The MIMO-OOK Frame Control field (5.2.1.1.5): a 3-bit Frame Type plus four single-bit flags packed into one octet. It is present only when MIMO-OOK is the active PHY VII mode.
caption.zh: MIMO-OOK 帧控制字段（5.2.1.1.5）：一个 3 比特的帧类型外加四个单比特标志，压缩进一个八位字节。仅当 MIMO-OOK 为当前 PHY VII 模式时才存在。

blocks.en: Clause 6.4.1 (MAC constants) extends Table 61 of MAC sublayer constants so the existing housekeeping values cover PHY VII. The most telling change is aMinMPDUOverhead — the minimum octets the MAC adds to the PSDU (PHY service data unit) — which is listed as '7/9' for PHY VII (the same as PHY V and PHY VI). Other constants like aUnitBackoffPeriod (20 optical clocks for the random-access algorithm) and aNumSuperframeSlots (16) are inherited unchanged. Notice that timing is counted in optical clocks, not microseconds — the optical clock rate is the heartbeat of an OCC link.
blocks.zh: 第 6.4.1 条（MAC 常量）扩展了 MAC 子层常量表 61，使既有的管理性数值涵盖 PHY VII。最能说明问题的改动是 aMinMPDUOverhead——MAC 添加到 PSDU（PHY 服务数据单元，PHY service data unit）上的最小八位字节数——对 PHY VII 列为“7/9”（与 PHY V、PHY VI 相同）。其他常量，如 aUnitBackoffPeriod（随机接入算法的 20 个光学时钟）和 aNumSuperframeSlots（16），则原样继承。请注意时间是以光学时钟而非微秒来计的——光学时钟速率是 OCC 链路的心跳。

blocks.en: Clause 8 (PHY specification) is where PHY VII becomes a real radio-of-light. Sub-clause 8.2 (Operating modes) inserts Table 79a listing the seven PHY VII modes with their optical clock rates, run-length-limited (RLL) line codes, forward error correction (FEC), and data rates — for example RS-OFDM with 16-QAM at a 40 kHz clock reaches 9.216 Mbps, while MIMO-OOK runs slow and robust at 8-16 kbps. Sub-clause 8.3.4 (Minimum LIFS, SIFS, and RIFS periods) adds PHY VII to Table 81 with all three interframe spaces — long (LIFS), short (SIFS), and reduced (RIFS) — set to 0 optical clocks, matching the other camera PHYs.
blocks.zh: 第 8 条（PHY 规范）才是 PHY VII 真正成为一台“光的电台”的地方。子条款 8.2（工作模式）插入了表 79a，列出七种 PHY VII 模式及其光学时钟速率、行程长度受限（RLL，run-length-limited）线路编码、前向纠错（FEC，forward error correction）和数据速率——例如采用 16-QAM 的 RS-OFDM 在 40 kHz 时钟下可达 9.216 Mbps，而 MIMO-OOK 则以 8-16 kbps 慢速且稳健地运行。子条款 8.3.4（最小 LIFS、SIFS 与 RIFS 周期）将 PHY VII 加入表 81，三种帧间隔——长（LIFS）、短（SIFS）和缩减（RIFS）——均设为 0 个光学时钟，与其他相机 PHY 保持一致。

blocks.en: Why is dimming a PHY concern? Because the transmitter is a light bulb. People must not see flicker, and they may want to dim the room. Clause 8.5.2 (Dimming during data transmission time) makes brightness control part of the modulation itself, so data keeps flowing while the average light level is held wherever the user sets it.
blocks.zh: 为什么调光是 PHY 该操心的事？因为发射机就是一盏灯。人眼绝不能察觉到闪烁，而用户又可能想把房间调暗。第 8.5.2 条（数据传输期间的调光）把亮度控制做成调制本身的一部分，于是在数据持续流动的同时，平均光强始终保持在用户设定的水平。

blocks.en: Sub-clause 8.5.2 (Dimming during data transmission time) inserts 8.5.2.7 with one recipe per PHY VII mode. RS-OFDM and O-NOMA dim by simply scaling the amplitude of the signal driving the light sources. MIMO-COOK keeps a constant 50% average brightness using symmetric symbols, then dims by tuning the amplitude of the ones versus the zeros in the on-off-keying (OOK) signal. MIMO-OOK dims the same way. Hybrid modulation uses BPPM to apply two dimming levels (a low and a high) onto the high-rate waveform, shaping a low-rate brightness envelope.
blocks.zh: 子条款 8.5.2（数据传输期间的调光）插入了 8.5.2.7，为每种 PHY VII 模式给出一套做法。RS-OFDM 和 O-NOMA 通过简单地缩放驱动光源的信号幅度来调光。MIMO-COOK 利用对称符号保持恒定的 50% 平均亮度，然后通过调节通断键控（OOK，on-off keying）信号中“1”与“0”的幅度来调光。MIMO-OOK 也采用同样方式。混合调制则使用 BPPM 在高速率波形上施加两级调光（一低一高），从而塑造出低速率的亮度包络。

blocks.en: Clause 8.6 (PPDU format) defines the PHY protocol data unit — the actual bits sent over light. The amendment inserts a PHY VII case into each of its five sub-clauses. 8.6.1 (Preamble field): RS-OFDM and O-NOMA use no preamble, while MIMO-COOK, MIMO-OOK, and Hybrid modulation use PIB-configurable OOK/hybrid preambles. 8.6.2 (PHY Header field): only RS-OFDM and O-NOMA carry a header (a 16-bit PSDU Length plus 6 reserved bits); MIMO-COOK, MIMO-OOK, and Hybrid carry none. 8.6.3 (HCS field) and 8.6.4 (Optional field): both unused for all of PHY VII — the header check sequence (HCS) and optional field simply do not appear.
blocks.zh: 第 8.6 条（PPDU 格式）定义了 PHY 协议数据单元（PPDU）——也就是真正通过光发送出去的比特。修正案在其五个子条款中各插入一个 PHY VII 分支。8.6.1（前导字段）：RS-OFDM 和 O-NOMA 不使用前导，而 MIMO-COOK、MIMO-OOK 和混合调制使用可由 PIB 配置的 OOK/混合前导。8.6.2（PHY 头字段）：只有 RS-OFDM 和 O-NOMA 携带头部（一个 16 比特的 PSDU 长度加 6 个保留比特）；MIMO-COOK、MIMO-OOK 和混合调制都不携带。8.6.3（HCS 字段）和 8.6.4（可选字段）：对所有 PHY VII 模式均不使用——头校验序列（HCS，header check sequence）和可选字段干脆不出现。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 640 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><text x="8" y="16" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">RS-OFDM / O-NOMA PPDU (header present, no preamble)</text><rect x="8" y="24" width="180" height="34"/><rect x="188" y="24" width="444" height="34"/><text x="30" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">PHY Header (PSDU Length 16b)</text><text x="360" y="45" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">PSDU (variable)</text><text x="8" y="86" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="12">MIMO-COOK / MIMO-OOK PPDU (sub-packets, no header)</text><rect x="8" y="94" width="110" height="34"/><rect x="118" y="94" width="110" height="34"/><rect x="228" y="94" width="60" height="34"/><rect x="288" y="94" width="110" height="34"/><text x="30" y="115" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Sub-packet 1</text><text x="140" y="115" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Sub-packet 2</text><text x="248" y="115" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11">...</text><text x="305" y="115" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">Sub-packet N</text><text x="8" y="146" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10">each sub-packet = Preamble + payload (SN, LED-ID, data bits)</text></svg>

caption.en: Two PHY VII PPDU shapes (8.6.5). RS-OFDM/O-NOMA stream a header plus a variable PSDU; MIMO-COOK/MIMO-OOK chain self-contained sub-packets, each with its own preamble and an LED-ID payload.
caption.zh: 两种 PHY VII 的 PPDU 形态（8.6.5）。RS-OFDM/O-NOMA 发送一个头部加一段可变 PSDU；MIMO-COOK/MIMO-OOK 则串接若干自包含的子分组，每个子分组都带有自己的前导和一段 LED-ID 负载。

blocks.en: Sub-clause 8.6.5 (PSDU field) describes the payload itself, and the two families differ sharply. For RS-OFDM and O-NOMA the PSDU is a variable bit stream counted from one PPDU preamble to the next. For MIMO-COOK and MIMO-OOK the PSDU is a chain of self-contained data sub-packets: each MIMO-COOK sub-packet has its own preamble plus a payload carrying the SN, a LED-ID (which light source it came from), the data bits, and an end marker; MIMO-OOK sub-packets are similar but simpler. Hybrid modulation packs high-rate encoder symbols inside the low and high dimming periods of a low-rate envelope. PSDU length is always set through the PHY PIB attribute phyPSDULength.
blocks.zh: 子条款 8.6.5（PSDU 字段）描述负载本身，而两大家族在此截然不同。对 RS-OFDM 和 O-NOMA，PSDU 是一段可变比特流，从一个 PPDU 前导计到下一个前导。对 MIMO-COOK 和 MIMO-OOK，PSDU 则是一串自包含的数据子分组：每个 MIMO-COOK 子分组都带有自己的前导，加上一段携带 SN、LED-ID（标明数据来自哪个光源）、数据比特和结束标记的负载；MIMO-OOK 子分组与之类似但更简单。混合调制把高速率编码符号封装进低速率包络的低调光段与高调光段之内。PSDU 长度始终通过 PHY PIB 属性 phyPSDULength 设置。

blocks.en:
flowchart TD
  A[DME writes PHY PIB] --> B{PHY VII mode?}
  B -->|RS-OFDM / O-NOMA| C[Header + variable PSDU]
  B -->|MIMO-COOK / MIMO-OOK| D[Sub-packet chain, no header]
  B -->|Hybrid| E[High-rate symbols in dimming envelope]
  C --> F[Light source transmits]
  D --> F
  E --> F
  F --> G[Camera recovers frame-by-frame]
blocks.zh:
flowchart TD
  A[DME 写入 PHY PIB] --> B{PHY VII 模式?}
  B -->|RS-OFDM / O-NOMA| C[头部 + 可变 PSDU]
  B -->|MIMO-COOK / MIMO-OOK| D[子分组链, 无头部]
  B -->|混合调制| E[调光包络内的高速率符号]
  C --> F[光源发送]
  D --> F
  E --> F
  F --> G[相机逐帧恢复]

blocks.en: Clause 9 (PHY service specifications) closes the loop. Sub-clause 9.5.2 (PHY PIB attributes) appends new rows to Table 115 — one block of attributes per PHY VII mode. For RS-OFDM (identifiers 0x96-0x9b) you set the optical clock rate, mode, FEC, packet symbol length, SN length, and QAM level. For MIMO-COOK (0x9c-0xa4) you set clock rate, RLL code, FEC, preamble symbol, SN length, LED-ID length, mode, number of LEDs, and sub-packet length. O-NOMA (0xa5+) adds clock rate, power level, and FEC. These PIB attributes are exactly the knobs the DME writes (per 4.4.1) so the PHY knows how to build and read every PPDU we just described — no over-the-air negotiation needed.
blocks.zh: 第 9 条（PHY 服务规范）完成了闭环。子条款 9.5.2（PHY PIB 属性）向表 115 追加了新行——每种 PHY VII 模式对应一组属性。对 RS-OFDM（标识符 0x96-0x9b），你需要设置光学时钟速率、模式、FEC、分组符号长度、SN 长度和 QAM 等级。对 MIMO-COOK（0x9c-0xa4），你需要设置时钟速率、RLL 编码、FEC、前导符号、SN 长度、LED-ID 长度、模式、LED 数量和子分组长度。O-NOMA（0xa5 起）则新增时钟速率、功率电平和 FEC。这些 PIB 属性正是 DME（依据 4.4.1）写入的旋钮，使 PHY 知道如何构建和解析我们刚才描述的每一个 PPDU——无需任何空口协商。

summary.en: Coverage map: every clause taught here, with exact numbers
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：本课所讲每一条款及精确编号

blocks.en: 3.2 Acronyms and abbreviations — adds BPPM, HOOK-OFDM, HS2PSK-OFDM, MIMO-COOK, MIMO-OOK, O-NOMA, RS-OFDM, SN. 4.4.1 PHY types — inserts item (g) PHY VII (up to 9.6 Mbps, IoT, high-speed camera, <10 km/h) and the PIB-only configuration rule. 5.1.2 Starting an OWPAN — extends device discovery (5.1.2.4.2) to PHY VII. 5.2.1 General MAC frame formats — adds the MIMO-OOK Frame Control field (5.2.1.1.5) and the rule that Sequence Number, addresses, payload, and FCS are used only in MIMO-OOK mode. 5.3 MAC command frames — updates the Capabilities information element (Table 18) with a PHY VII support bit. 6.4.1 MAC constants — extends Table 61 (aMinMPDUOverhead 7/9 for PHY VII, etc.). 8.2 Operating modes — inserts Table 79a (seven PHY VII modes, clock rates, RLL, FEC, data rates). 8.3.4 Minimum LIFS/SIFS/RIFS periods — adds the PHY VII row (all 0) to Table 81. 8.5.2 Dimming during data transmission time — inserts 8.5.2.7 (per-mode dimming recipes) and a Table 83 row. 8.6.1 Preamble field — 8.6.1.5 (RS-OFDM/O-NOMA none; MIMO-COOK/MIMO-OOK/Hybrid PIB-configurable). 8.6.2 PHY Header field — 8.6.2.5 (RS-OFDM/O-NOMA carry a header; others none). 8.6.3 HCS field — 8.6.3.5 (not used). 8.6.4 Optional field — 8.6.4.5 (not used). 8.6.5 PSDU field — 8.6.5.5 (variable stream vs. sub-packet chains; phyPSDULength). 9.5.2 PHY PIB attributes — appends per-mode attribute blocks to Table 115 (RS-OFDM 0x96-0x9b, MIMO-COOK 0x9c-0xa4, O-NOMA 0xa5+).
blocks.zh: 3.2 缩略语与缩写——新增 BPPM、HOOK-OFDM、HS2PSK-OFDM、MIMO-COOK、MIMO-OOK、O-NOMA、RS-OFDM、SN。4.4.1 PHY 类型——插入第 (g) 项 PHY VII（最高 9.6 Mbps、IoT、高速相机、低于 10 km/h）及仅用 PIB 配置的规则。5.1.2 启动 OWPAN——将设备发现（5.1.2.4.2）扩展至 PHY VII。5.2.1 通用 MAC 帧格式——新增 MIMO-OOK 帧控制字段（5.2.1.1.5），并规定序列号、地址、负载和 FCS 仅在 MIMO-OOK 模式下使用。5.3 MAC 命令帧——在能力信息元素（表 18）中加入 PHY VII 支持比特。6.4.1 MAC 常量——扩展表 61（PHY VII 的 aMinMPDUOverhead 为 7/9 等）。8.2 工作模式——插入表 79a（七种 PHY VII 模式、时钟速率、RLL、FEC、数据速率）。8.3.4 最小 LIFS/SIFS/RIFS 周期——向表 81 加入 PHY VII 行（全为 0）。8.5.2 数据传输期间的调光——插入 8.5.2.7（各模式调光做法）及表 83 一行。8.6.1 前导字段——8.6.1.5（RS-OFDM/O-NOMA 无；MIMO-COOK/MIMO-OOK/混合可由 PIB 配置）。8.6.2 PHY 头字段——8.6.2.5（RS-OFDM/O-NOMA 带头；其余无）。8.6.3 HCS 字段——8.6.3.5（不使用）。8.6.4 可选字段——8.6.4.5（不使用）。8.6.5 PSDU 字段——8.6.5.5（可变流 vs. 子分组链；phyPSDULength）。9.5.2 PHY PIB 属性——向表 115 追加各模式属性块（RS-OFDM 0x96-0x9b、MIMO-COOK 0x9c-0xa4、O-NOMA 0xa5 起）。

cites.note: 3.2 new acronyms (BPPM, HOOK-OFDM, HS2PSK-OFDM, MIMO-COOK, MIMO-OOK, O-NOMA, RS-OFDM, SN); 4.4.1 PHY VII item (g) and PIB-only configuration rule.
5.1.2 device discovery; 5.2.1 MIMO-OOK Frame Control field and field-usage rules; 5.3 Capabilities IE PHY VII support bit.
6.4.1 Table 61 MAC constants; 8.2 Table 79a PHY VII operating modes; 8.3.4 Table 81 LIFS/SIFS/RIFS (PHY VII = 0).
8.5.2.7 per-mode dimming; 8.6.1-8.6.5 PPDU preamble/header/HCS/optional/PSDU for PHY VII; 9.5.2 Table 115 PHY PIB attributes.
